topIssues: image 3 (default - light): The join input container retains a colored terracotta border in its default state, which conflicts with the focus-ring grammar established in the dark focus state.
image 1 (default - dark): Low contrast on the 'DISPLAY NAME' label and 'e.g. Priya' placeholder text makes form fields hard to read against the dark background.
fixSuggestions: Use a neutral gray border for the join input in the light theme default state, reserving the terracotta border exclusively for active focus.
Increase the contrast of all label, placeholder, and secondary body text across both dark and light themes to meet WCAG AA standards.
